color-no-hex.message: Use a design token — var(--neutral-…/--primary-…/--status-… etc.), not a raw hex color. See src/tokens/tokens.css.

function-disallowed-list.message: Use a design token instead of a raw color function. If you need transparency, add/reuse a token in src/tokens/tokens.css.

property-disallowed-list.message: Do not set font-family — Inter is applied globally. Remove this declaration.
